creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
Xorg 7.3 crashed when running mplayer with KDE and some heavy operations (link world rebuilding in the background). The driver used was i810. It's not 100% reproducable, but after 3 tries I had 2 crashes. Note this occurs with DRI forcebly disabled.

Some notes:
1) after the crash the server fails to restore text console mode, I see the same resolution image with depth changed to 16 colors.
2) vidcontrol MODE_279 (the same resolution and depth) resets the display to some usable mode, so I can change it to the text mode then
3) starting Xserver one more time (without rebooting) makes it die the same way just after it has started up
4) after some tries I get a square approx. 150x150 pixels of black-white blinking mess, it stays at the same position and overlaps the normal console output even after vidcontrol reset as described in (2) - both to graphical and to text mode

Note I've already filed ports/116603 and ports/116605, those are reported for 6.2 and may be realted to this bug, but this time the log shows something more specific.

Here's the Xorg.log (the Xorg.conf is attached):
